basic_details.job_title: DMMU Purba Bardhaman Community Auditor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 63 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: District Mission Management Unit Purba Bardhaman (DMMU Purba Bardhaman)
basic_details.short_information: District Mission Management Unit Purba Bardhaman (DMMU Purba Bardhaman) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 63 Community Auditor Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can download the application form from the official website and submit it offline.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 25 years Maximum Age: 40 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Higher Secondary / equivalent with commerce background or Graduate in any stream, Basic computer skills (MS Word, Excel, Internet) desirable, Knowledge of Book keeping & Accounting
qualification.details: Must be women and active member of an active SHG under NRLM for at least two years. Must have member code in NRLM MIS (LokOS). At least Higher Secondary with commerce background or graduate. Knowledge of bookkeeping & accounting. Basic computer skills desirable.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://purbabardhaman.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 27-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

DMMU Purba Bardhaman Community Auditor Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Must be women and active member of an active SHG under NRLM for at least two years. Must have member code in NRLM MIS (LokOS). At least Higher Secondary with commerce background or graduate. Knowledge of bookkeeping & accounting. Basic computer skills desirable.

content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 25 years Maximum Age: 40 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

content_sections.heading: DMMU Purba Bardhaman Community Auditor Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://purbabardhaman.nic.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 27-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: DMMU Purba Bardhaman Community Auditor Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Community Auditor post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the Community Auditor post is 27th July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the Community Auditor position?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement is 25 years, and the maximum age limit is 40 years as of 01-01-2026. Age relaxation may be applicable as per government norms.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for the Community Auditor role?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed Higher Secondary with a commerce background or be a graduate in any stream. Knowledge of bookkeeping and accounting is essential, and basic computer skills are desirable.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for the Community Auditor recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Community Auditor post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 63 vacancies for the Community Auditor post announced by the District Mission Management Unit Purba Bardhaman.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the Community Auditor post is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post or as instructed in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Community Auditor position?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Written Examination followed by an Interview. Candidates need to perform well in both stages to be considered for the role.

faq.question: Q8. What specific criteria must women candidates meet to be eligible?
faq.answer: Eligible women candidates must be active members of an active SHG under NRLM for at least two years and possess a member code in NRLM MIS (LokOS).

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Purba Bardhaman district, which is https://purbabardhaman.nic.in. Links are also provided in the Important Links section.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for the Community Auditor position?
faq.answer: The Community Auditor position is a contractual job offered by the District Mission Management Unit Purba Bardhaman.
